MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Michael Hall, Esq. for Plaintiff: KOHEI, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witnesses: Joe Yamamoto, also present.
Defendant: Sayako Hori, present in pro per.
Case settled, signed Settlement Agreement and Stipulation for Entry of Judgment, or Dismissal filed in court.
Parties agreed to terms of the signed stipulation filed in court, Trial vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2006 Off Calendar

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE; TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
